title: Video Engagement Metrics: The Hidden Signal for AI Overviews
excerpt: AI overviews rely heavily on user satisfaction signals. Learn why metrics like audience retention and watch time are critical for your AEO success.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
Answer Engines are designed to provide the *best* answer, not just the most relevant one. How do they know an answer is the best? User engagement.

Retention is King

If users consistently drop off 10 seconds into your video, AI algorithms assume the content is unhelpful. Maximize retention by removing fluff, keeping visuals dynamic, and delivering the core value (the answer!) as quickly as possible. High retention leads to frequent AI citations.
